targets.query:
from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi" and r.sensor_name == "Ulkolämpötila")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -6h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rooms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.room_type == "bedroom" or r.room_type == "common" or r.room_type == "basement")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field != "Kellari_eteinen")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> mean()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Sisälämpötila"}))

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "hotwater_temp")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi" and r.sensor_name == "Keittiö")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "humidity")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hvac" and r.sensor_group == "power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.meter == "heatpump" or r.meter == "extra")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Total_Active_Power")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -6h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hvac")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Ulkolampotila" or r._field == "Tuloilma_ennen_lammitysta" or r._field == "Poistoilma")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _time: now()}))
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.Ulkolampotila and exists r.Tuloilma_ennen_lammitysta and exists r.Poistoilma)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.Poistoilma != r.Ulkolampotila)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
    _time: r._time,
    _value: (r.Tuloilma_ennen_lammitysta - r.Ulkolampotila) / (r.Poistoilma - r.Ulkolampotila) * 100.0,
    _field: "LTO hyötysuhde"
  }))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0.0 and r._value <= 100.0)

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi" and r.sensor_name == "Keittiö")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "co2")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "heating_optimizer" and r._field == "tier")
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: if r._value == "CHEAP" then "0" else if r._value == "NORMAL" then "1" else "2"}))
  |> toFloat()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi" and r.sensor_name == "Sauna")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> derivative(unit: 1m, nonNegative: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if r._value > 0.05 then 1.0 else 0.0}))
  |> mean()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if r._value >= 0.3 then 1.0 else 0.0, _field: "Sauna"}))

import "array"

comp = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "compressor")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

hw = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "hotwater_production")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

alarmMax = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "alarm")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field != "alarm_indoor_sensor")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> max()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

status = if alarmMax._value > 0.5 then 3
  else if comp._value == 1 and hw._value == 1 then 2
  else if comp._value == 1 then 1
  else 0

array.from(rows: [{_time: now(), _value: status, _field: "compressor"}])

import "array"

keittio = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi" and r.sensor_name == "Keittiö")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pressure")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

ulko = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi" and r.sensor_name == "Ulkolämpötila")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pressure")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

val = if exists keittio._value and exists ulko._value then keittio._value - ulko._value else 0.0

array.from(rows: [{_time: now(), _value: val, _field: "IVK tila"}])

import "array"

kw3 = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "aux_heater_3kw")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

kw6 = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "aux_heater_6kw")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

status = if kw3._value == 1 and kw6._value == 1 then 2
  else if kw6._value == 1 then 3
  else if kw3._value == 1 then 1
  else 0

array.from(rows: [{_time: now(), _value: status, _field: "Lisävastus"}])

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -6h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rooms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.room_type == "pid")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sum()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Lämmitystarve"}))

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi" and r.sensor_name == "Keittiö")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pm2_5")
  |> last()

import "join"

temps = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "supply_temp" or r._field == "return_temp")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.supply_temp and exists r.return_temp)

comp = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "status" and r._field == "compressor")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> group()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

join.inner(
  left: temps,
  right: comp,
  on: (l, r) => l._time == r._time,
  as: (l, r) => ({_time: l._time, supply_temp: l.supply_temp, return_temp: l.return_temp, comp: r._value}),
)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.comp > 0.0)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
    _time: r._time,
    _value: 1.965 * (r.supply_temp - r.return_temp) / (1.77 + (r.supply_temp - 35.0) * 0.5 / 15.0),
    _field: "COP"
  }))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0.0 and r._value <= 10.0)
  |> mean()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "COP"}))

windowPeriod = if int(v: v.windowPeriod) < 60000000000 then 1m else v.windowPeriod

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi" and r.sensor_name == "Ulkolämpötila")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Ulkolämpötila"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rooms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.room_type == "bedroom" or r.room_type == "common" or r.room_type == "basement")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field != "Kellari_eteinen")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["_time", "floor"])
  |> mean()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value, _field: if r.floor == "2" then "2. kerros" else if r.floor == "1" then "1. kerros" else "Kellari"}))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -6h, stop: now())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "electricity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "price_with_tax")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Mennyt"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

import "experimental"

stop = experimental.addDuration(d: 12h, to: now())

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h, stop: stop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "electricity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "price_with_tax")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._time >= now())
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Tuleva"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "heating_optimizer" and r._field == "evu_active")
  |> last()
